content:
1. Generates a monthly article report with summaries; exists for a demo but scales badly due to N+1 queries.
2. Be careful about performance: it fetches authors one-by-one inside a loop. Batch-fetch authors or push filtering to SQL.
3. Whether to batch-fetch authors or push filter to SQL — noted as open questions in the comments.
4. Unhandled: empty month (no articles), large result sets (memory), invalid month input, categories filter may be slow on large lists.
